title: Azurium : Tools - Armor
description: Add New Simple Material [ Azurium Tools And Armors ] [ Not OP Mod ] [ Hardcore ]
body:
**[ Beta Version ! More Support Versions In Coming Soon ] Support : Just Enough Items (JEI) - Overflowing Bars**

# **Azurium :**

**Azurium** is a material Can Be Crafted, used primarily to upgrade **Netherite** gear. **Azurium** items are more powerful and durable than **Netherite**, and **Azurium** blocks are also unbreakable by the strongest explosions from normal gameplay (such as TNT), 

# **Blocks And Items :**

- **Azurium Dust**
- **Azurium Ingot**
- **Azurium Nugget**
- **Azurium Block**
- **Azurium Upgrade Template**

# **Gear :**

- **Azurium Helmet**
- **Azurium Chestplate**
- **Azurium Leggings**
- **Azurium Boots**
- **Azurium Sword**
- **Azurium Axe**
- **Azurium Pickaxe**
- **Azurium Shovel**
- **Azurium Hoe**
